h468d871dg30f2g4ec1g8ec1g1ac190c2a4d5: The goblins are your responsibility tonight. I have other matters to attend to.
h0c2fdbe3g5139g44a1g86e6g84b47d36b661: Celebrate our victory. We have earned the Absolute's favour, but She will ask more of us soon.
h411aa509g1167g42e3g8ed7g742a92d16be4: Celebrate as long as you please, but save your strength. There will be no rest tonight - your body is mine.
hf2281f39gb944g4fbaga808gff39cc93c3cb: Begone, insect. I have found somebody more deserving.
hf72fca05g6937g4c52g922ag17851af44b47: Already regretting your decision? I hope you're ready to beg for my company.
hab792be5gce13g4573ga725g1a97d6c685b6: I'll beg if you want me to.
h91b56729gd374g4026ga8c1g858b86dd6cde: *As she looks you up and down, her mind touches yours - you feel her hand at your neck, her lips closing around yours.*
h8bc8992bg5012g4cdcgbaf6gf0fb03d5d439: Are you ready to give yourself to me?
h35c09106gb2a2g4e7ag8fc8gf062d554e091: Good. I will join you when you go to your bed. You are mine.
h21af046ag0c57g4845ga6f8gb330e53d3524: If you already have doubts, you would only have disappointed me. Get out of my sight.
h78fab953g919fg4a12ga944g4afd865fbc5f: In Menzoberranzan, the high-born would prostrate themselves before me for a fleeting taste of my body.
h825fb4fag9458g4a72ga12agc53c2c0c2189: You are barely worthy to look at me. Get out of my sight.
hf77ef850g1f8bg4bbbgb36agd3cbdf82f1aa: *Then her teeth fasten to your lip, biting, tearing - blood spills into your mouth, rushes down your throat.*
hc5eab1d7g8701g403fgbefdg8a221417907c: You have already chosen a distraction for the night, I see.
hc0669c05gfa90g4de7gbfecg9761547cda9e: How disappointing for you. I could have shown you ecstasy.
